text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide has completed the initial and most
crucial three years of her career, and the Arima
Kinen is over as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the older of the two powerhouse sisters,
there's a lot she still has to do. For starters...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Help!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I-I just... It's my phone, I—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: No! Brian sent a message!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: She asked me to "hang out" this weekend!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
H-how can you be so nonchalant?! This is an
emergency!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian went out of her way to invite me out!
And she specifically said this weekend!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: It's almost like we're normal sisters...
choice_data_list: Well... I mean, you two are sisters, so...
Well... I mean, you two are sisters, so...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I know! But...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It's been ages since she reached out to invite me
anywhere.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And since she wants to meet during our time off,
there's a high probability she needs a favor or has
something serious to talk about.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
What should I do if she needs advice? I'm not
even sure how to answer her as her older sister.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I just hope I won't disappoint her.
choice_data_list: You're in your head too much again.
You're in your head too much again.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ack!
choice_data_list: Don't worry. Sisterly advice will come naturally.
Don't worry. Sisterly advice will come naturally.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hm...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
(I hope I'm not forgetting anything. Okay, I have
my handkerchief and some tissues... and some
bandages for her.)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: (I'm ready!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Big Sis.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hi, Bri—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: You're wearing a tracksuit?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I just got done training. Let's go.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Huh? W-wait!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hm, those were some pretty good races.
Especially that girl in the ninth one. She's got
potential.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Sis? What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Why...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hey, you still alive?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Why haven't you asked me for any advice yet?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What are you talking about?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Y-you're the one who invited me out to spend
time with you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Yeah, and?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Don't you have some burning problem you need
me to solve? Do you need advice on your stride
or your next race? Or something?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Nope.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Nope?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Nothing.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh... Well... O-okay...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
What, did you want me to have some kind of
problem?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: No! I just... feel like I've been tricked in some way.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I thought for sure you had something to discuss or
that you had a favor to ask me...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huh. Okay.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: In that case... I guess...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! As I said in my message earlier, I need to
use your kitchen.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
So I can fulfill my sister's request. The dorm
kitchen is currently closed for repairs, so I can't
use it right now.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I just need to whip up some curry and I'll be out of
your hair. I promise I'll clean up after myself, so
please let me use it!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I'll only be four or five hours!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide bounces over to my kitchen with a
spring in her step.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Sorry about my pushy sister.
choice_data_list: Did you want curry that bad?
Did you want curry that bad?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
She was desperate for me to ask her a favor. This
is all I could come up with.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I would've been fine just spending the day talking
together, but whatever.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Brian! I put in four onions, as usual! I'll be
sure to stew them until they dissolve, okay?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: 'Kay.
choice_data_list: So, why did you want to see her on a weekend?
So, why did you want to see her on a weekend?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I didn't want to bother her on a weekday since
it'd cut into her training sessions with you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
And I want her to keep getting better so I can
race her at her best.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for letting me use your kitchen. The curry
is all ready!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Well, I guess we'll be goi—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Why don't we just eat here?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
What? Are you feeling okay? You've always been
so shy around people you don't know well.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'm not a kid anymore. Besides, it's your trainer.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
And I want to ask about some things—like what
you've been up to for the past three years.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
My sister said you're a very reliable trainer. I'd
like to hear how she stacks up, for future
reference.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Uh... What?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Heh. We might be seeing a lot of each other for a
long while yet, so let's try to get along.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
W-wait a minute! What, exactly, are we talking
about here?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: And what are you agreeing so easily with Brian for, Trainer?! I'm the one you'll be seeing a lot of!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide is completely flustered by the
surprising turn of events, while Narita Brian seems
to be enjoying the consternation she's caused.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their relationship might not be typical, but
they're still definitely sisters.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And the curry tastes even better in good
company.
